content.problemStatement:
Chef has an array AAA of NNN positive integers. Chef can perform the following operation any (possibly zero) number of times on the array.


Choose any index iii such that (1<i‚â§N)(1 \lt i \le N)(1<i‚â§N);
Choose an integer XXX such that (1‚â§X‚â§Ai)(1\le X \le A_i)(1‚â§X‚â§Ai‚Äã);
Set A(i‚àí1):=A(i‚àí1)+XA_{(i-1)} := A_{(i-1)} + XA(i‚àí1)‚Äã:=A(i‚àí1)‚Äã+X;
Set Ai:=Ai‚àíXA_i := A_i - XAi‚Äã:=Ai‚Äã‚àíX.
Help Chef to **minimize** the **maximum** value of array AAA using the above operations .


Input Format

The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
Each test case consists of two lines of input.

The first line of each test case contains a single integer NNN, the size of array AAA.
The second line of each test case contains NNN space-seperated integers, the elements of array AAA.




Output Format
For each test case, output on a new line, the minimized maximum value possible of array AAA.
constraints: The sum of NNN over all test cases won't exceed 10510^5105.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test case 111: Consider the following 333 operations on the array.

Choose i=3i = 3i=3 and X=4X = 4X=4. Here X‚â§A3X \le A_3X‚â§A3‚Äã. After operation, the array becomes [1,9,3,6][1,9,3,6][1,9,3,6].
Choose i=2i = 2i=2 and X=4X = 4X=4. Here X‚â§A2X \le A_2X‚â§A2‚Äã. After operation, the array becomes [5,5,3,6][5,5,3,6][5,5,3,6].
Choose i=4i = 4i=4 and X=1X = 1X=1. Here X‚â§A4X \le A_4X‚â§A4‚Äã. After operation, the array becomes [5,5,4,5][5,5,4,5][5,5,4,5].

So the minimum value of maximum element of array is 555.
Test case 222: Consider the following 222 operations on the array.

Choose i=2i = 2i=2 and X=8X = 8X=8. Here X‚â§A2X \le A_2X‚â§A2‚Äã. After operation, the array becomes [13,7,19][13, 7, 19][13,7,19].
Choose i=3i = 3i=3 and X=6X = 6X=6. Here X‚â§A3X \le A_3X‚â§A3‚Äã. After operation, the array becomes [13,13,13][13, 13, 13][13,13,13].

So the minimum value of maximum element of array is 555.
Test case 333: We cannot make A1A_1A1‚Äã less than 101010 using any number of operations. Thus, the minimum value of maximum element is 101010.
